app_tagline: Single-page AI tool for product captions, hashtags, and smart suggestions.
hero_badge: No database. No npm. File-based history.
hero_title: Create captions that sell, in the language your audience trusts.
hero_description: Pick a product type, choose the output language, describe the item, and let AI generate a caption, hashtags, and a practical suggestion in one place.
product_description_placeholder: Example: premium leather wallet with RFID protection, magnetic closure, and a gift-ready box.
history_empty: Your recent generations will appear here and stay saved in a file.
history_hint: History is stored locally in a JSON file under storage/app.
footer: Made with ❤️ for fast Instagram selling workflows.
loading_text: AI is crafting your caption and hashtags...
error_missing_api: AI configuration is missing. Please check your .env file.
error_failed: Something went wrong while generating content.
